title: PromptuKit Exam Metadata
description: Schema for exam metadata files consumable by promptukit.create_exam via the --metadata flag. All fields are optional; omitted fields fall back to DEFAULT_METADATA in create_exam.py.

title.description: Main exam title rendered at the top of the PDF (e.g. 'CVEN 4333: Engineering Hydrology').

institution.description: Institution or department name shown in the subtitle line.

instructor.description: Instructor or professor name shown in the subtitle line alongside the institution.

exam_type.description: Short descriptor of the exam format shown below the subtitle (e.g. 'Multiple Choice Examination — 60 Questions').

header_fields.description: Rows of the student info table printed beneath the title block. Each row is an array of cell strings.

instructions.description: Instruction paragraph printed before the questions. Supports ReportLab HTML-like tags such as <b>, <i>, <sub>, <super>, and HTML entities like —.

footer.description: Text printed at the bottom of the last page. Supports the same ReportLab markup as 'instructions'.
